Please pay your bill for the account ending in soon
Your account ending with 0000 has an upcoming payment due. Having trouble viewing this email? Click here to view in browser.


Dear TEST USER,

Per your request, we are sending you a reminder that your National Grid bill is unpaid and should be paid on or before May 21, 2026 for this service account.
Account Number:******0000
Pay By:May 21, 2026
Total Amount Due:$255.40
Pay Now
Please be aware that if your payment is received after May 21, 2026, you
may be subject to a late payment fee, if applicable.

You're currently receiving National Grid communications at test@example.com. To receive communications at a different email address, change it here.

This message was sent from an unmonitored email address.
Please do not reply to this message. 
 
Please add nationalgrid@emails.nationalgridus.com to your address book to continue to receive our e-mails.

This message was sent to test@example.com. This e-mail and any files transmitted with it are confidential and are intended solely for the use of the individual or entity to whom it is addressed. If you have received this e-mail in error, please Contact us.
